groups.showTooltip: Toggle individual traces in the time view
groups.axisTooltip: Toggle the RA and Dec error traces
groups.raTooltip: Toggle every RA-axis overlay (error trace, correction pulses, mount limits) at once. Turning the axis back on restores the same combination of sub-traces that was visible before — it does not enable all three. (Shortcut: R)
groups.decTooltip: Toggle every Dec-axis overlay (error trace, correction pulses, mount limits) at once. Turning the axis back on restores the same combination of sub-traces that was visible before — it does not enable all three. (Shortcut: D)
groups.pulsesTooltip: Toggle correction-pulse bars on the 0 line
groups.guideStarTooltip: Toggle the guide-star Mass and SNR overlays at once. Turning the group back on restores whichever combination of Mass / SNR was visible before — it does not enable both. (Shortcut: S)
groups.rangeSliderTooltip: Show or hide the navigator strip beneath the chart
groups.exportTooltip: Save the current chart or its data to a file
groups.coordTooltip: Coordinate frame for the error trace
groups.deviceTooltip: Filter entries by which device made the correction
groups.displayTooltip: Show chart display options: view, scale, Y-axis, coordinate frame, device, range slider, and export

rangeSlider.showTooltip: Show the navigator strip beneath the chart. Hide it for snappier dragging when many traces are visible.

view.timeTooltip: Time-series view: error traces and pulses vs. time
view.scatterTooltip: Scatter view: each frame as a point in (RA, Dec) space, with the error ellipse

traces.raPulsesTooltip: Show/hide RA correction pulse durations as bars on the 0 line
traces.decPulsesTooltip: Show/hide Dec correction pulse durations as bars on the 0 line
traces.flipRaPulsesTooltip: Invert the RA correction-pulse bar direction. Useful when calibration polarity makes East commands read on the wrong side of the 0 line. Tooltip values stay raw signed ms.
traces.flipDecPulsesTooltip: Invert the Dec correction-pulse bar direction. Useful when calibration polarity makes North commands read on the wrong side of the 0 line. Tooltip values stay raw signed ms.
traces.flipPulsesDisabled: Turn the pulse trace on first to flip its direction
traces.raLimitsTooltip: Show/hide RA mount-limit dotted lines (max-RA-duration and min-motion thresholds from the session header)
traces.decLimitsTooltip: Show/hide Dec mount-limit dotted lines (max-Dec-duration and min-motion thresholds from the session header)
traces.massTooltip: Show/hide guide-star mass (yellow), scaled to the bottom half of the chart
traces.snrTooltip: Show/hide guide-star SNR (white), scaled to the bottom half of the chart
traces.eventsTooltip: Show INFO events as inline labels along the bottom of the chart (matches the desktop "events" checkbox). (Shortcut: E)
traces.togglesScatterDisabled: Trace toggles only apply in time view

coord.raDecTooltip: Plot mount-frame RA and Dec error (Dec is negated so north points up)
coord.dxDyTooltip: Plot raw camera-frame dx and dy (useful when calibration is suspect)

device.mountTooltip: Show only frames where the mount made the correction
device.aoTooltip: Show only frames where the AO unit made the correction
device.noAo: No AO data in this session — all frames are mount frames
device.noAoShort: No AO data in this session

scale.arcsecTooltip: Display Y values in arc-seconds (multiplied by the session pixel scale)
scale.pixelsTooltip: Display Y values in raw pixels
scale.autoYTooltip: Auto-fit Y to the typical guiding range (99th percentile of |error|), so dithers and lost-star spikes don't squash the routine signal. Off = use raw min/max.
scale.yLockedTooltip: Lock Y range across section changes so different nights can be compared at the same scale
scale.recenterYTooltip: Recenter Y axis around 0 without changing the current zoom level

export.pngTooltip: Download a high-resolution PNG snapshot of the current chart
export.csvTooltip: Download the entries of the current section as a CSV (includes an Excluded column for frames you've removed from the analysis)

legend.tooltip: Vertical dotted line styles you'll see overlaid on the chart. Hover any line for the event text.

exclusions.tooltip: Frames excluded from stats / total frames in this section
exclusions.label: {{excluded}} / {{total}} excluded

gestureHint: scroll = X zoom · drag = X pan + Y zoom · shift+drag = include · ctrl+drag = exclude

contextMenu.includeAllTooltip: Re-include every frame; clears all exclusions in this section
contextMenu.excludeAllTooltip: Mark every frame as excluded from the analysis
contextMenu.excludeDithersTooltip: Add settling windows (and frames just after each DITHER event) to the existing exclusions
contextMenu.resetSectionTooltip: Reset this section's exclusions to its loaded state
contextMenu.resetZoomTooltip: Auto-fit the X and Y axes to the full data range
contextMenu.analysisTooltip: Open the Analysis modal: drift-corrected timeline + FFT periodogram for the included, non-excluded frames in this section. Inside the modal you can switch between 'Residual error' (what's left after PHD2 corrections) and 'Raw RA' (RA corrections re-added) without leaving the analysis view, and lock the periodogram Y-axis to compare peak amplitudes at the same scale.
contextMenu.analyzeUnguidedTooltip: Analyze the unguided window under the cursor (or the first one in the session if you right-clicked elsewhere)
